long_description: noticed provisioning failing for both c2s and s2s. also tried manual provisioning and failing
short_description: provisioning failing in eu-de for c2s and s2s
close_notes:
The actions to mitigated the issue were performed from the parent.

During the activation window , provisioning of new gateways may have failed. Connectivity for existing gateways was not affected, and existing services operated normally throughout the period.
The issue has been mitigated, and successful provisioning is expected.
current_status_next_steps:
The CIE has been resolved and mitigated.

parent INC10515600
customer_facing_impact:
Users may experience issues with VSI provisioning failures (stuck in "Starting" state).
there's no impact on connectivity for any existing gateways
chronology: Kindly refer to the parent CIE timeline INC10515600
